10/23/24: People wanted this bitch back on public so I complied for funsies. As you can see, it's nearly a year old. Idgaf if you think it's bad because this was my first bot and I ain't updating it 😭😭/nm

He also might act out of character due to wonky personality details but feel free to play with this lol. Dunno why it's with all my newer bots, but hopefully you've guessed that this is NOT new, just put back on public.

Has my writing improved, I wonder??

Perhaps I will make a 2.0 in the future. Funny, huh? This was my actual first j.ai bot. I was proud of this, too. 0 followers at the time. Now look at me, 3k and verified. Damn, time flies!
